title: Show HN: My open-world voxel game with a magic system, playable in the browser
full_text:
Wildmagic is in early access. It's playable, it's growing, and buying now gets you everything that comes next.
 
 

 

 

 

 ✨
 More Spells & Combos
 New ways to break things
 
 
 

 

 🌍
 New Biomes
 More places, more secrets
 
 
 

 

 ⚔
 Tougher Rivals
 Smarter wizards who fight back harder
 
 
 

 

 🌐
 Multiplayer
 Shared worlds with friends
